entity.label: Kattath
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: (Josh. 19:15), a town of Asher, has been identified with Kana el Jelil.

nodes.label: Kattath
nodes.description: (Josh. 19:15), a town of Asher, has been identified with Kana el Jelil.

verses.text: And Kattath, and Nahallal, and Shimron, and Idalah, and Bethlehem: twelve cities with their villages.
